Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPCOND2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; ENCODE^VPRJSON 6411 ; LIST^GMPLUTL2 2741 ; SRCHCOND(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Search Condition N X,DFN,ICN,GMPL,RES,ICNID,SMRY,PAGING,CNT,RSLTCNT,RSLTARY S (DFN,ICN)="",(CNT,RSLTCNT,SMRY)=0 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS) ;clean out unused params D CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS ; S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCHCOND^DVPCOND2")=0 G QUIT ; ;Check _summary status S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; D LIST^GMPLUTL2(.GMPL,DFN,"OTHER",0) ; N X S X=0 F S X=$O(GMPL(X)) Q:X="" D . S CNT=CNT+1,RSLTARY(CNT)=GMPL(X) ; N PAGING D:CNT>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(CNT,.PAGING) . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . D FHRCOND^DVPCOND1(.RES,$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("problem",ICN,$P(RSLTARY(RSLTCNT),U)),ICN,SMRY) . . M @TARGET@("results","conditions",RSLTCNT)=RES D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS QUIT ; Q
